message:
fix(wasm): Use dynamic imports for optional WASM module

Convert static WASM imports to dynamic imports so the comparison module
can load when WASM isn't built (e.g., in CI test environment).

Changes:
- edit-distance.ts: Use dynamic import() for @phage/wasm-compute
- kmer-analysis.ts: Use dynamic import() for @phage/wasm-compute
- Add null checks before calling WASM functions
- Initialize WASM asynchronously on module load
- Gracefully fall back to JS implementations when WASM unavailable

This fixes CI test failures caused by WASM module not being built.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
